name: decent-chat
description: Monorepo for decent-protocol SDK and decent-client-web reference implementation

scripts.dev: bun run dev:signal & bun run dev:client
scripts.test:all: bun test && cd decent-client-web && bun run test:unit
scripts.gate:predeploy: cd decent-protocol && bun test tests/unit/perf-integrity-audit.test.ts && bun run tests/perf/run.ts --scenario=smoke --check-integrity --peers=20 && bun run tests/perf/run.ts --scenario=reconnect-chaos --check-integrity --peers=20
scripts.gate:quick: cd decent-protocol && bun test tests/unit/perf-integrity-audit.test.ts && bun run tests/perf/run.ts --scenario=smoke --check-integrity --peers=5
